global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the brand and call-to-action messages.
global.main_message: Promoting weekend travel options through HorizonHop.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and rectangular shapes in a soft blue color, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes layered over the background, creating a visually interesting composition.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangular shape positioned slightly above the small circle.

elements.label: Main call to action
elements.description: A prominent text element stating 'Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap' in a bold, easy-to-read font.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'HorizonHop' displayed at the top of the ad in a large, bold font.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller text element saying 'Watch now' located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The brand logo is at the top, the main call to action is centered, and the secondary call to action is at the bottom.
